title: Will Bitcoin close above $100,000 on March 1, 2026?

momentum_quant.reasoning: 30-day moving average crossed bullish; spot ETF inflows accelerating week-over-week.

contrarian.reasoning: Crowded retail long; positioning data shows late-cycle marginal buyers.

macro_hawk.reasoning: Fed stance and DXY trajectory dominate crypto in Q1; macro neutral-bearish.

tech_fundamentals.reasoning: Spot ETF aggregate AUM > $80B; post-halving supply schedule tight.

political_analyst.reasoning: Pro-asset regulatory tone; SAB-122 reversal supportive of institutional flows.

risk_factors: BTC ETF outflows accelerate on a macro liquidity shock
Major exchange security incident or surprise enforcement action
Halving-cycle thesis fails to convert to price in the available window

title: Will the Fed cut rates at the next FOMC meeting?

momentum_quant.reasoning: FOMC dot plot trending hawkish; rates futures pricing < 25bps cut.

contrarian.reasoning: Market underpricing dovish surprise; Treasury rhetoric softening.

tech_fundamentals.reasoning: Bond market implied probability tracks ~20-22% — anchor to that signal.

political_analyst.reasoning: Political pressure on Fed to cut but Powell remains data-dependent.

risk_factors: Core inflation reading surprises hot before the meeting
Labor market remains tight in next NFP print
Geopolitical event triggers risk-off and forces dovish pivot

title: Will SpaceX Starship V2 complete an orbital flight in Q1 2026?

momentum_quant.reasoning: SpaceX hit cadence targets last three launches; preflight checks completed.

contrarian.reasoning: Cadence has slipped twice this year; market overconfident in linear extrapolation.

macro_hawk.reasoning: Macro irrelevant; pure engineering execution question.

tech_fundamentals.reasoning: 13/13 recent static fire tests successful; orbital readiness >90% per filings.

political_analyst.reasoning: FAA license cycle improving but still gated; political risk minimal.

risk_factors: Static-fire failure during final integration
FAA license amendment delay
Weather/range scrub pushes attempt past Q1 cutoff
